reasons.title: Forecast median
reasons.body: 1D projects 66.83, 3D points toward 68.03, and 5D stretches toward 69.07.

reasons.title: Price trend
reasons.body: Price is +20.78% over 5D and +26.78% over 20D. Current structural read is uptrend, which is why the model is not working in a vacuum.

reasons.title: Headline and chatter
reasons.body: Current headline read is supportive, while community chatter reads mixed. That overlay does not retrain the model, but it absolutely changes how much trust to give the setup today.

reasons.title: Uncertainty and event risk
reasons.body: The modeled move envelope spans about 15.77% top to bottom. Earnings are roughly 19 day(s) out, so event risk stays on the board. Current event-risk state is moderate.
